heroSection.title: Fresh Juices aur Shakes yahan milega!
heroSection.text: Thanda, tasty aur healthy juice aur milkshake – ab paas mein!
heroSection.timing: Subah 7 baje se raat 10 baje tak available. Call ya message karein!
heroSection.address: Akshya Nagar 1st Block, Rammurthy Nagar, Bangalore-560016

sections.title: Fresh Juice aur Milkshakes
sections.description: Thande, fresh aur healthy juice aur shakes – aapke liye specially taiyar!

items.title: Pineapple Juice Ananas
items.srtdsc: Taza pineapple ka juice, sehat aur swaad dono ke liye perfect.

items.title: Grapes Juice Angoor
items.srtdsc: Meetha aur taza angoor ka juice, perfect energy drink.

items.title: Watermelon Juice Tarbooj
items.srtdsc: Thanda aur refreshing tarbooj ka juice garmi mein zaroor try karein.

items.title: Lime Juice Nimbu
items.srtdsc: Taza nimbu ka juice, sehat ke liye faydemand aur swaad mein behtareen.

items.title: Mint Lime Juice Pudina Nimbu
items.srtdsc: Pudina aur nimbu ka combo – taza aur sehatmand drink.

items.title: Sweet Lime Juice Mosambi
items.srtdsc: Meetha nimbu ka juice – halka, tasty aur fresh.

items.title: Orange Juice Santra
items.srtdsc: Vitamin C se bharpoor taza santra ka juice.

items.title: Mixed Fruit Juice Mix Fruit
items.srtdsc: Alag alag fruits ka mix – swaad aur poshan dono ka mel.

items.title: Muskmelon Juice Kharbooza
items.srtdsc: Thanda aur poshtik kharbooza ka juice.

items.title: Pulpy Grape Juice Angoor Pulpy
items.srtdsc: Thoda guda ke saath angoor ka juice – rich texture ke saath.

items.title: Tender Coconut Juice Nariyal Pani
items.srtdsc: Thanda nariyal pani – garmi mein sehat ke liye best option.

items.title: Banana Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Kela aur doodh ka creamy aur tasty milkshake.

items.title: Papaya Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Papita ka rich aur healthy milkshake.

items.title: Apple Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Seb aur doodh ka delicious aur refreshing shake.

items.title: Mango Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Aam ka summer special creamy shake.

items.title: Pomegranate Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Anar ka nutritious aur tasty shake.

items.title: Sapota Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Chiku ka rich aur meetha shake.

items.title: Butter Fruit Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Butter fruit ka creamy aur rich milkshake.

items.title: Oreo Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Oreo biscuit ke saath tasty aur creamy shake.

items.title: Rose Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Gulab essence se bana halka aur refreshing shake.

items.title: Litchi Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Litchi ka sweet aur tasty shake.

items.title: Special Dry Fruit Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Dry fruits ka nutritious aur rich shake.

items.title: Strawberry Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Strawberry flavor wala creamy ice cream shake.

items.title: Vanilla Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Classic vanilla ice cream ka smooth shake.

items.title: Pista Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Pista flavor ka rich aur tasty shake.

items.title: Butter Scotch Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Butter scotch flavor ka creamy shake.

items.title: Black Current Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Black current flavor ka unique ice cream shake.

items.title: Chocolate Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Chocolate lovers ke liye perfect creamy shake.

items.title: Mango Milkshake
items.srtdsc: Aam flavor ka ice cream shake, summer ka favorite.

sections.title: यादें और पल
sections.description: यहाँ हर तस्वीर चाय की खुशबू और अच्छे पलों को दर्शाती है।

sections.title: Send me a message
sections.description: Koi sawal hai ya order dena hai? Telegram par message karein!
